awards: Nominated for 2 BAFTA 24 wins & 27 nominations total
writer: Peter Lord, Nick Park, Karey Kirkpatrick
actors: Mel Gibson, Julia Sawalha, Phil Daniels
plot: Having been hopelessly repressed and facing eventual certain death at the chicken farm where they are held, Rocky the rooster and Ginger the chicken decide to rebel against the evil Mr. and Ms. Tweedy, the farm's owners. Rocky and Ginger lead their fellow chickens in a great escape from the murderous farmers and their farm of doom.
